positive: A whimsical illustration of a group of sleepy forest critters (fox, bunny, owl) nestled among glowing mushrooms and soft moss. Storybook style, highly detailed, watercolor and colored pencil aesthetic, gentle lighting, trending on ArtStation.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photorealism, creepy, scary
